prompt: Create a candid flash-photography snapshot of a young woman named unnamed woman crouching with her knees up on a dark gray couch while eating dinner indoors at night. She has black hair tied back in a loose ponytail and wears a white sleeveless overall-style romper with shoulder straps and metal buttons. Her face is deliberately anonymized by a flat vertical tan rectangle covering the entire facial area, with no facial features visible. She holds a small white plate in one hand containing exactly 3 visible fried or grilled food pieces with a small dark-green vegetable garnish, and holds wooden chopsticks in the other hand near her mouth. The room is dim and intimate, lit by harsh direct camera flash with warm film-grain texture, slight underexposure, and casual disposable-camera realism. Background details include exactly 3 main environment elements: a sheer white curtain on the left, a small dark round side table near the couch, and an exposed red-brown brick wall on the right. Compose as a square 1:1 image, waist-up to knees visible, centered subject, natural clutter-free apartment setting, muted colors, realistic skin tones, no text, no watermark.
